name: Centralized Error Handler
description: Surfaces custom errors that provider extensions report (via a console.error convention) as toasts and a tray list. Works around Seanime swallowing provider errors before they reach the client.
author: aquaryuo

networkAccess.reasoning: Polls the local Seanime server's /api/v1/logs/latest endpoint to collect errors that provider extensions report via console.error, and surfaces them to the user.
